plain: A single piece of information, like a document or picture.
why: Everything you work with on a computer is a file.

plain: A container that holds files and other folders.
why: Keeps files organized so you can find them.
example: School folder with all homework files.

plain: The place where files from the internet usually go.
example: A picture saved from a website.

plain: A tool that shows which programs are running and how busy the computer is.
why: Helps fix slow or frozen computers.
